pattern: A postorder walk emits a node only after both subtrees are done — left subtree, then right, then the node itself.
hints: A node's value is recorded last, once both of its children have been fully visited.
Recursively that is: process left, process right, then append this node's value.
One iterative trick is a reversed preorder: collect root, right, left and reverse the whole list at the end.

edge_inputs.description: deepest node emitted before its ancestors
left-skewed chain so the root comes out last

stress.note: first element non-null so the root exists
